name: design_intake
description: Find and analyze the provided design materials (files/links), determine the "source of truth" for the user interface, and extract verifiable rules (screens, components, tokens, states).
default_prompt: Use $design_intake when the task matches the "Design Intake" skill.
triggers: Find and analyze the provided design materials (files/links), determine the "source of truth" for the user interface, and extract verifiable rules (screens, components, tokens, states)
